architecture.summary: Localized changes to search ranking formula and crawler filter. No new components or architectural changes.

integrations.summary: N/A - no new external integrations, fixing existing crawler and search logic

ui-ux.summary: N/A - backend-only changes, no UI impact beyond improved search result ordering

performance.summary: Negligible - certBonus computation is O(1) per entry, added to existing O(n) sort

security.summary: N/A - no auth, data, or permission changes

edge-cases.summary: Postgres fallback needs certTier ORDER BY. vendor-detect.js also out of sync. Both JS and TS discovery files need fix. vskillInstalls stays out of ranking. Manual re-crawl as post-deploy step.
